items.title: Project header collapses and expands its session list
items.precondition: DevEasy running; Sessions panel open; at least one project with sessions visible in the left rail.
steps: 2. Click a project header row (chevron + name).
3. Observe the project's git line and session list.
4. Click the same header row again.
items.expected: First click hides the git line and session list, leaving only the header (chevron points right). Second click restores them (chevron points down).

items.title: Collapse state survives a page reload
items.precondition: At least one project collapsed via T1.
steps: 3. Look at the previously collapsed projects.
items.expected: The same projects remain collapsed after reload; non-collapsed projects remain expanded. localStorage key 'deveasy:sidebar-collapsed-projects' holds the collapsed ids.

items.title: Folder and new-session buttons still work and do not toggle collapse
items.precondition: A project visible in the rail, expanded.
steps: 1. Click the folder (code editor) button on a project header.
3. Click the + (new session) button on a project header.
items.expected: Folder button opens the code editor; + creates a new session. Neither click collapses or expands the project group.
